name: tmux-control
description: Send and capture commands to tmux windows from inside pi. Complements /agents bg.
//peer: typebox is provided by pi's extension loader (jiti virtualModules) at runtime. It is bundled inside @earendil-works/pi-coding-agent/node_modules, so end users do NOT need to install it. We declare it as a devDependency for the test runner, which runs via `node --experimental-strip-types` and does not have access to pi's loader context.
